errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or go back to the home page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This branch leads nowhere. The page may have been moved or never existed.

auth.descriptionGoogle: Sign in with your Google account to unlock all features and save your progress
auth.continueWithoutLogin: You can continue without signing in, but you won't have access to the features listed above.

saveShortcuts.title: Save shortcuts
saveShortcuts.description: Pin your most visited nodes to speed up navigation

dailyAndRandomChallenges.title: Daily and random challenges
dailyAndRandomChallenges.description: Fresh challenges every day to test your knowledge

viewHistory.title: View history
viewHistory.description: Track the species you have already explored

speciesGallery.title: Species gallery
speciesGallery.description: Organize and favorite the species you have discovered

activityHistory.title: Activity history
activityHistory.description: See a summary of your interactions on the platform

errors.authUrlMissing: The authentication URL was not generated
errors.popupBlocked: Could not open the sign-in window. Please check your pop-up blocker.
errors.sessionNotEstablished: The session was not established after authentication
errors.userDataLoadFailed: Could not load the user data

nav.logoutWarning: When you sign out, your features and progress will only be available when you sign in again.

profilePage.rankingHint: Score on explored species, hit accuracy and speed to keep climbing.
profilePage.devNoticeDescription: Treevera is still in its early stages. During this period, updates and improvements may affect your progress (species seen, challenges, achievements). It's part of the project's evolution!

activity.title: ACTIVITY
activity.emptyHint: Explore species and complete challenges to record your journey!

primeira_descoberta.name: First discovery
primeira_descoberta.description: First species explored in the taxonomic tree.

habito_selvagem.name: Wild streak
habito_selvagem.description: 7 consecutive days with at least one new species explored.

vitrine_pessoal.name: Personal showcase
vitrine_pessoal.description: 4 species pinned as favorites on the profile.

semana_perfeita.name: Perfect week
semana_perfeita.description: 7 consecutive days of daily challenges completed.

shortcuts.title: SHORTCUTS
shortcuts.emptyHint: Create shortcuts by browsing the tree
shortcuts.tip: Browse the taxonomic tree and save selected nodes as shortcuts for quick access.

favSpecies.title: FAVORITE SPECIES
favSpecies.pickerEmptyHint: Favorite species in the gallery to add them here

specieDetail.author: Author
specieDetail.imageNote: Images are sourced from Wikipedia, iNaturalist and GBIF, and may be missing for species with limited visual documentation.
specieDetail.dataProvidedBy: Data provided by the Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF).
specieDetail.unfavTop4Body: This species is among your top 4 favorites highlighted on your profile. Unfavoriting it will remove it from your Top 4.
specieDetail.noFavoritersYet: No one has favorited this species yet
specieDetail.noListsYet: This species is not in any list yet

occurrenceMap.dataNote: . The points represent global records from various databases, which may differ from the image source above.

tree.loadErrorMessage: Could not load the tree. Please try again.
tree.noDataMessage: No taxonomic data to display yet.
tree.emptyNodeAcceptedPrefix: {{name}} is registered as an accepted classification in
tree.emptyNodeAcceptedSuffix: but it has no recorded descendants.
tree.emptyNodeSettingsHint: If you do not want to see nodes without descendants, disable it in
tree.emptyNodeSettingsPath: Menu > Settings > Show nodes without descendants
tree.searchBannerHint: Type the taxon name you're looking for

search.lineageError: Could not retrieve lineage for the selected item
search.rankNotInTree: This taxon (subspecies, variety, etc.) does not exist in the tree

explore.selectKingdom: Choose a Kingdom to start exploring!

challenge.title: Daily Challenge
challenge.missionDescription: A new species every day to challenge your mastery of the taxonomic tree. Complete all classifications and track your progress.
challenge.randomMissionDescription: Unlimited challenges with surprise species. Practice freely and strengthen your understanding of taxonomic pathways.
challenge.randomNoChallenge: No challenges available right now. Try again later.
challenge.incompatibleSpecies: This species has incompatible taxonomic data and cannot be used in challenges. It has been automatically removed from the species pool.
challenge.leaveToProfileWarning: You have a challenge in progress. Going to your profile will cancel it. Do you want to continue?
challenge.leaveToExploreWarning: You have a challenge in progress. Going to Explore will cancel it. Do you want to continue?
challenge.noTips: No tips available for this step.
challenge.followPathHelp: Expand the taxonomic tree groups following the correct path until you reach the species {{speciesName}}.

lists.title: Lists
lists.noSpeciesInList: This list has no species yet
lists.emptyLikedListsHint: Explore and like other users' lists!
lists.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this list? This action cannot be undone.
lists.removeSpeciesConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this species from the list?
lists.visibilityPublicHint: Anyone can see and like this list.
lists.visibilityPrivateHint: Only you can see this list. Make it public to share it.
lists.shareText: Check out the list "{{name}}" on TreeVera

settings.title: Settings

account.title: Account
account.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
account.removePhotoDescription: Are you sure you want to remove your profile photo?

tree.title: Taxonomic Tree
tree.description: Control how the taxonomic tree is displayed.
tree.showEmptyNodesDescription: By default, only nodes with descendants are shown. Enable this to show all nodes.
tree.showRankBadgeDescription: Always show the rank badge (for example: Order, Family) next to each node. When disabled, the badge only appears on hover.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.audioDescription: Enable or disable sound effects during challenges.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.clearCacheDescription: Removes cached data such as species information you have already viewed. The data will be reloaded on the next request.

settings.loginToSavePreference: Sign in to save this preference.

vulnerability.unknown: Not in the IUCN Red List
vulnerability.unknownDesc: This species has no data in the IUCN Red List. The list assesses living species under current threats. Prehistoric species, geologically extinct groups, and poorly documented taxa often have no record.
vulnerability.EXDesc: This species has completely disappeared from Earth.
vulnerability.EWDesc: Survives only in captivity; extinct in its natural habitat.
vulnerability.CRDesc: Extremely high risk of extinction in the wild.
vulnerability.ENDesc: Very high risk of extinction in the wild.
vulnerability.VUDesc: High risk of extinction if threats persist.
vulnerability.NTDesc: Close to the threat threshold; closely monitored.
vulnerability.LCDesc: No significant threat of extinction at this time.
vulnerability.DDDesc: Insufficient data to assess the risk of extinction.
vulnerability.NEDesc: Not yet assessed under IUCN criteria.
